explanations.1: This warning means the code is checking a condition using eval (dynamic evaluation) after already extracting some data from patterns, which is slower than checking the condition directly in the pattern matching itself.
explanations.2: The system is warning that checking if a content type is JSON using eval is inefficient; it would be faster to filter for JSON types during the initial pattern matching.
explanations.10: A simple null-check like this one should ideally be part of the pattern matching rules from the start, rather than evaluated as an afterthought, because it would skip unnecessary processing.
